title: Delta Appoints Justin Reid to Its Board of Directors
text: Kingston, Ontario--(Newsfile Corp. - July 31, 2023) - Delta Resources Limited ( TSXV : DLTA ) ( OTC Pink: DTARF ) ( FSE : 6G01 ) ("Delta" or "The Company") is pleased to announce the appointment of Justin Reid to its Board of Directors. Mr. Reid is a geologist and capital markets executive with over 25 years of experience focused exclusively on the mineral resource space.

title: Delta Doubles Its Land Position at the Delta-1 Property in Thunder Bay, Ontario
text: Kingston, Ontario--(Newsfile Corp. - July 13, 2023) - Delta Resources Limited  ( TSXV : DLTA ) ( OTC Pink: DTARF ) ( FSE : 6G01 )  ("Delta" or "The Company") is pleased to announce that it continues to further expand the Delta-1 property in Thunder Bay, Ontario by doubling its land position. Following the previously announced acquisitions on September 7, 2022, October 31, 2022, December 13, 2022, February 16, 2023, and May 4, 2023, Delta has now acquired the exclusive rights to an additional four (4) mineral exploration properties covering a total of approximately 4,716 hectares contiguous to its Delta-1 property package.
